title: Iron Frost
description: Build a city and survive in a steampunk frozen world | Create, Minecolonies, TerraSnow
body:
#  **Iron Frost**
![Iron Frost Tittle Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80a81a3804ab4c76ca423f0799a4a9cf85ab80ac_0.webp)
Survive the cold in the **Iron Frost**. Here in the cold you can hire and manage citizens to build your city and with the power of steam you might just conquer the snow.

This is built around 3 core mods. 
**Create** for its steampunk automation
**Minecolonies** to build and manage your own city
**Terralith** with some added config mods to turn everything to snow

These together with many other mod additions create a snowy winter wonderland to explore and survive in. This is more of a laid back experience without harsh weather or overly challenging mobs creating a unique experience for a casual cold play through.

![ModListWide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91639e022d24980c8bdc183510f4fad89d99c033.png)
## Shaders

[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris),
[Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches)

## Resource Packs

[Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark),
[Rainbow's Foliage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rainbows-foliage)
